creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 209439
patch to support non-clang build of graphics/openimageio

Larry suggests wrapping the whole _LIBCPP_ALTERNATE_STRING_LAYOUT if block in a test for _LIBCPP_VERSION.

See https://github.com/OpenImageIO/oiio/pull/2415

A quick test where _LIBCPP_VERSION is never defined builds for me.
